summary: Backend-only testing for Iteration 14: FAZ 1 (TR il/ilçe), FAZ 2 (notification providers + templates + test + logs), FAZ 3 (SMS OTP password reset), ve order status → notification_logs hook. 18/18 pytest testi PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: notifications.py get_providers returns raw providers dict without masking secrets even though the docstring says 'mask secrets'. Credentials (netgsm password, twilio auth_token, meta tokens) are returned in plaintext. Recommend masking password/token-like keys before returning to admin UI.

orders.py update_order_status: send_notification is awaited inline inside the PUT request path. With the real HTTP-attar SMS providers (Netgsm/Twilio/VatanSMS/İletiMerkezi), a slow provider will directly slow the admin status-change response. Consider BackgroundTasks or a fire-and-forget task to decouple.

auth.py forgot-password endpoints: each call inserts a new password_reset_otps record without rate-limiting by phone or IP. An attacker can enumerate/flood OTP records. Recommend per-phone throttle (e.g. 1 request / 60s) even though response is intentionally uniform.

auth.py forgot-password/verify-otp: attempts counter is incremented BEFORE code comparison, which is correct, but a wrong code returns 400 without re-querying; after 5 attempts the 429 branch applies. This is good. However, successful verify does not invalidate older unused OTPs for the same phone — older codes remain valid until expiry.

notification_service.py: sys.path manipulation inside routes (sys.path.insert) is fragile. Since notification_service.py lives in /app/backend/ and routes already do relative imports elsewhere, a top-level import at module top is cleaner and faster.
locations.py uses a module-level cache (_tr_cache) loaded from a JSON file — fine for 81 provinces but there is no TTL/reload mechanism; acceptable for static data.
No /api prefix is on the auth router itself (prefix='/auth'), but main app mounts routers under /api — verified working.
test_credentials: admin@facette.com / admin123 (login via query params POST /api/auth/login?email=...&password=...)
seed_data_creation: 1 test order created (Hook Tester, phone 05551112233, email hooktest@example.com) to verify the order status → notification_logs hook. notification_providers config was set to sms_active=netgsm with sample creds. notification_templates seeded (10 events × 3 channels = 30 entries). A test notification_logs row was written for event=order_confirmed (status=failed due to mock netgsm credentials — expected per problem statement).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test file /app/backend/tests/test_iteration14_notifications_locations_otp.py covers FAZ1/FAZ2/FAZ3 + order hook. It creates a test order every run — cumulative orders and logs will grow. Use pytest with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL set from frontend/.env. Login is via query params, not JSON body. Response field is 'token'. Default istanbul district count = 39.
rca of the issue: N/A — all targeted features working as specified. The only fix during testing was making the order-hook test actually create a fresh order with shipping_address.phone+email (first list-based version was a no-op because the only pre-existing test order had empty shipping_address, so send_notification correctly skipped dispatch and no log was written). New test validates the hook end-to-end.
